# DOW-UAP-D61, Mission Report, Persian Gulf, August 2020 - Page 1

Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on 22 January 2026

[redacted]

# Misrep 4685903

## Narrative
[redacted] AT 2307Z, [1.4a] TOOK OFF FROM OKAS. AT 2320Z, [1.4a] HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. FROM 0003Z TO 1917Z, [1.4a] COLLECTED SIGINT VIA AIRHANDLER. FROM 0041Z TO 1840Z, [1.4a] SUPPORTED NAVCENT TO OPERATION [redacted] [1.4a] IVO ARABIAN GULF, STRAIT OF HORMUZ AND GULF OF OMAN. SEE ISR LINE 1. AT 0532Z, [1.4a] RECEIVED A GUARD CALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 1. AT 1840Z, [1.4a] WAS CLEARED TO RTB. AT 1944Z, [1.4a] HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. AT 2012Z, [1.4a] LANDED AT OKAS. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS1. 21 MISSION HOURS, 17.9 IMINT HOURS, 1 IMINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 19.2 SIGINT HOURS, 1 SIGINT TASKING PROSECUTED, 2 TOTAL TASKINGS PROSECUTED

# DOW-UAP-D61, Mission Report, Persian Gulf, August 2020 - Page 5

Declassified by MG Richard A, Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 22 January 2026

- Sensors Available: AH\GMESH
- Tasking Type: PLANNED
- Tasking or Request Number (JTAR#, AEM#, PRI#, or TIC#): -
- BE Number (if NTISR): -
- Tasked Start Point: 39RUN46[redacted]
- Activity Description: ISR
- FMV or Image File Name (if NTISR): -

### GENTEXT/ISR

- Gentext: [redacted] COORDINATED WITH NAVCENT 24 HOURS PRIOR TO TAKE OFF. PRECOORD WAS SATISFACTORY. AT 0041Z, [redacted] ARRIVED ON STATION ISO NAVCENT TO OPERATION [redacted] TO CHARACTERIZE IRIN\IRGCN VESSELS, UAS ACTIVITY, ACTIVITY OUTSIDE OF PORTS, AND TO ESTABLISH PATTERN OF LIFE. FROM 0041Z TO 1840Z, [redacted] CONDUCTED SCANS IAW THE TARGET DECK IN THE ARABIAN GULF (AG). AT 0532Z, [redacted] RECEIVED A GUARD CALL. SEE GUARDCALL LINE 1. AT 0611Z, [redacted] OBSERVED ONE SMALL VESSEL DOCKED AT GREATER TUNB NAVAL PORT IVO 40RCQ30[redacted] AT 1527Z, [redacted] OBSERVED 1X UNK FORMATION. SEE OBSERVATION LINE 1. AT 1742Z, [redacted] OBSERVED 1X PROB NASER WAP BESIDES AN M\T VESSEL IVO 39RUN49[redacted] BOTH VESSELS WERE DEAD IN WATER (DIW) IVO GRIDS. ADDITIONALLY, 2X ADULT MALES (ADMS) WERE OBSERVED ON THE REAR DECK OF THE PROB NASER WAP. AT 0700Z, [redacted] OBSERVED 1X POSS IL-76 CANDID AT ABU MUSA ISLAND AFLD IVO 40RCP02[redacted] AT 1840Z, [redacted] WAS CLEARED OFF TASKING AND RETURNED TO BASE (RTB).

### ISR ASSET UTILIZATION

- Supported Unit: NAVCENT
- Supported Operation: OPERATION [redacted]
- Precoord Time: 24 HOURS
- Precoord Effectiveness: SATISFACTORY

### WEATHER

- Weather: LIGHT CLOUD COVERAGE PREVENTED CONTINUOUS TRACKING OF UAP EVENT

### EFFECTIVENESS

- Tasker:
- Intel Gap Filled?: No
- Gentext: -

[3.5c, (b)(6)]

USCENTCOM MDR 26-0019 | Approved for Release to AARO | 01/26/26 005
